prompt: generate a meme using the same visual action and format as the reference image but in the style of japanese anime, featuring the text 'Don't come' positioned similarly to maintain the humorous context and visual flow
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a character in the distinct style of Japanese anime, mimicking the visual action and composition of image 1. Position the sign clearly at the character's chest level, slightly to their right, maintaining the visual flow and humorous context seen in image 1.
